logs.message: WARNING: [SCHED 204-69] Unable to schedule 'store' operation (mmult_accel.cpp:20) of variable 'sum_1_2_19', mmult_accel.cpp:19 on array 'out_r' due to limited memory ports. Please consider using a memory core with more ports or partitioning the array 'out_r'.
WARNING: [SYN 201-107] Renaming port name 'mmult_hw/out' to 'mmult_hw/out_r' to avoid the conflict with HDL keywords or other object names.

WARNING: [SCHED 204-21] The critical path in module 'mmult_hw' consists of the following: 'mul' operation of DSP[195] ('tmp', mmult_accel.cpp:20) [189] (3.36 ns) 'add' operation of DSP[195] ('tmp_1', mmult_accel.cpp:20) [195] (3.02 ns) 'getelementptr' operation ('out_addr', mmult_accel.cpp:20) [197] (0 ns) 'store' operation (mmult_accel.cpp:20) of variable 'sum_1_40', mmult_accel.cpp:19 on array 'out_r' [450] (3.25 ns)
